title: Verify auth middleware integration test coverage
description: Auth middleware exists at src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts with full implementation. Unit tests exist in src/middleware/auth-middleware.test.ts covering valid token, missing token, and expired/invalid token scenarios. The withAuth HOC at src/auth/withAuth.ts protects routes without modifying route structure. Integration test: protected endpoint rejects unauthenticated request, accepts authenticated request is not present.
existing_patterns: src/auth/withAuth.ts - HOC pattern wrapping route handlers with JWT validation and RBAC
src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts - createAuthMiddleware factory returning AuthContext with user/session or error/status
src/middleware/auth-middleware.test.ts - vitest unit tests with UserStore, SessionStore, JwtService test fixtures
